references.title: Personalized and Automated Feedback in Summative Assessment Using Recommender Systems

annotations.text: Authors use a recommender system to provide automated feedback after summative assessment. The feedback is given in the form of a set of questions that would be benefical for the student in question.b This requires, first, the construction of a knowledge model of the learner and second the identification of the gaps in that knowledge.
Authors do recommendations using multiple popular algorithms. Results on secondary education level show that the recommendations can be done reasonably well without a lot of computational complexity.
